figures.caption: Figure 1: NAR and NAR-MBR decoding in Mask-CTC at Niter = 1. Differences from NAR decoding are highlighted .

Table 1: Comparison of WER for each decoding method. Bold and underlined texts indicate the best and second-best WER, respectively, among NAR and NAR-MBR decoding. “†” indicates that NAR-MBR decoding significantly outperforms NAR decoding for all Niter ∈ {0, 1, 10} (p < 0.05).

Table 2: Decoding speed and average GPU memory usage on LibriSpeech (LS) and Web, relative to Beam. Results of Niter = 10 in NAR-MBR decoding are omitted since peak WER was achieved at Niter = 1, as shown in Table 1.
